item.name: UFO Identification Key
item.description: A thin, rectangular piece of some unknown material. Placing it near your UFO will magically bring the starship to life.

mount.name: UFO
mount.action: Summon forth your UFO, and experience the sensation of an alien abduction.
mount.description: While appearing to be identical to PuPu's starship, this replica lacks certain functionalities such as a matter duplication facility, which, in light of recent events, is probably for the best. It is also unable to shrink you to a size to fit in the cockpit, meaning you do not so much ride as you are dangled around in its tractor beam.
mount.tooltip:
The Truth receives a large number
of reports from readers claiming to have
observed unidentified flying objects.
- Delion
